hero.title: Smart Health Assessment
hero.subtitle: Powered by AI
hero.description: Get instant preliminary health assessments based on your symptoms. Our AI helps you understand when to seek medical care and provides initial guidance in multiple languages.

symptomInput.title: Tell us about your symptoms
symptomInput.placeholder: Add a symptom (e.g., fever, cough, fatigue)
symptomInput.addSymptomError: Please add at least one symptom.
symptomInput.analysisError: Failed to analyze symptoms. Please check your internet connection and try again.

results.title: AI Assessment Results
results.noConditions: No conditions suggested. Try adding more specific symptoms.

disclaimer.title: Important Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: This AI symptom checker is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. It cannot replace professional medical consultation. Always consult with qualified healthcare providers for proper diagnosis and treatment. In case of emergency, contact local emergency services immediately.
